subcodes.first_line: O Jamal! The Self-Sufficient, the Most Exalted, maketh mention of thee amidst the concourse, that the fire may be kindled within thee and hearts may thereby be drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جمال یذکرک الغنی المتعال فی المال لتحدث فیک النار و تنجذب بها القلوب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
